## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions nearly doubled, largely due to an ABX vs ABM article; exploring more ABM-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [11 new articles ready for review; some title adjustments needed](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Implementing new process for content specificity and outline creation](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Planning to consolidate and upgrade underperforming content](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Updating meta descriptions and titles to improve SERP performance](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Clicks remained stagnant, but impressions almost doubled](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [ABX vs ABM article driving significant traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Average position slightly improved (37.6) week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [New content initially lowers average position before ranking improves](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [GA4 data to be included in future reports for more comprehensive insights](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Content Strategy and Review

  - [11 new articles ready for review; some require title adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Removing outdated content (e.g., AdWords-related articles)](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Focusing on ABM-related topics and cross-channel marketing attribution](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Implementing more specific outlines to avoid broad, irrelevant content](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [New freelance writer onboarded; Aida reviewing all content before submission](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### Technical SEO and Site Optimization

  - [Planning to use Screaming Frog for comprehensive site content overview](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Sitemap successfully submitted to Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Created filter for blog pages in Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Identifying and de-indexing outdated content to improve overall quality](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Exploring content consolidation opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)

### Content Production Challenges

  - [Difficulties with AI tools (e.g., AirOps) in producing long-form content (10-15k words)](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Considering alternative methods like iterative workflows or using ChatGPT for gated assets](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Meta Description and Title Updates

  - [8 articles updated with new meta descriptions and titles](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Using Mangool's SERP Simulator for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Aiming for 150 characters for descriptions, 50-55 characters for titles](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Mobile-first approach for meta description length](https://fathom.video/share/vHvBGv-HnGDXvcAhk_mTyao3gMjBqMzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
